title: Buttery Creamy Midnight Moroccan Turkey Stir-fry
description: A buttery and creamy moroccan dish featuring turkey mince, perfect for midnight craving with a dash-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 1 can (240ml) full-fat coconut milk
ingredients.notes: use fresh or frozen, if available

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet; sauté for about 5 minutes until soft and fragrant.
Add ground turkey and cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for 8-10 minutes until meat is well combined and lightly browned.
Stir in coconut milk; bring it to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
In another bowl, mix softened cream cheese with butter until smooth.
Pour the butter mixture over the stir-fried turkey slowly, stirring continuously to ensure everything melts together smoothly.
Simmer for about 10 minutes until creamy and well combined. Remove from heat and serve.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
